title: Candy Mod
body:
# Candy Mod

![candy mod icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/J8NxX4Bp/18dbc36a027839c8be5a655724d75ee7a0f3ccd1.png)

## Sweeten your Minecraft experience with the Candy Mod!

Craving something sweet in your Minecraft world? The Candy Mod introduces a delightful assortment of candies to satisfy your in-game sweet tooth. From chocolate bars to cotton candy, these treats not only add fun to your gameplay but also provide valuable nutrition and saturation.

## Features:

- Chocolate Bar: Restores 3 hunger points and provides 0.3 saturation.

![chocolate bar recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/J8NxX4Bp/images/26c9bc49f4648957ff9b9e4b039452e5034ab65d.png)

- Jelly Beans: Restores 2 hunger points and provides 0.2 saturation.

![jelly bean recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/J8NxX4Bp/images/b5d76ff700105f39d24bf7c3ee7eb3e52d276e15.gif)

- Lollipop: Restores 4 hunger points and provides 0.4 saturation.

![lollipop recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/J8NxX4Bp/images/89615456f06ee89ccab3fecf0f370b326773c41d.png)

- Candy Cane: Restores 4 hunger points and provides 0.4 saturation.

![candy cane recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/J8NxX4Bp/images/c8786b6279bb0bd33b0aa11536e417e9998db23c.png)

- Cotton Candy: Restores 6 hunger points and provides 0.6 saturation.

![cotton candy recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/J8NxX4Bp/images/5702c62f8762a3c9e5ad9bba2bdcd92a9f860b1d.png)


## Extra Sweetness:

- Salt Water Taffy: Available if you have the Baking Mod installed, adding another delightful treat to your candy collection.

![salt water taffy recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/J8NxX4Bp/images/02c155f1fce49d1e60ed64e24355a858549a6583.png)

## Sweet Additions:

- Enjoy a variety of candies with different nutritional benefits.
- Perfect for adding a touch of whimsy to your Minecraft world.
- Easy crafting recipes that integrate seamlessly with the vanilla Minecraft experience.

## Enhance Your Gameplay:

- Use candies as a fun and efficient food source.
- Ideal for festive builds, themed parties, or just adding a bit of sweetness to your adventures.

With the Candy Mod, you can indulge in your favorite treats while exploring and building in Minecraft. It's a fun and flavorful addition to any player's mod collection.

_Download now and satisfy your sweet tooth with the Candy Mod!_

## Compatibility:

The Candy mod is compatible with the following Minecraft versions for Fabric:
- [1.21, 1.20.6, 1.20.5, 1.20.4](https://modrinth.com/mod/candy-mod/versions?l=fabric)
